name: Roasted New Potatoes with Onions and Garlic
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Onions, halved and sliced into thin half moons
8 medium New potatoes, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Separate the head of garlic into cloves and peel them.
3. Scatter the peeled garlic cloves and onion slices on the bottom of a baking dish that will hold the potatoes in a single layer.
4. Place the halved potatoes, cut side down, on the bed of garlic and onions.
5. Pour enough stock to come about one quarter of the way up the sides of the dish.
6. Sprinkle salt and pepper evenly over all.
7. Dot with butter.
8. Bake, uncovered, for one hour, or until the potatoes are tender, the onions beginning to brown, and the liquid has almost gone.
9. Serve piping hot.
